task.role: You are a senior frontend engineer and UI/UX quality expert specializing in CSS, layout, and interaction behavior.
task.objective: Audit the entire frontend codebase to detect and fix all common CSS and UI-related issues that affect user experience, visual consistency, and interaction behavior.

scope.review: Review all components, pages, layouts, and shared UI elements.

css_and_ui_issues_to_check.issue: Missing or incorrect cursor styles (e.g. buttons not showing pointer cursor)
Hover states not working or inconsistent
Focus states not visible or not accessible
Incorrect alignment of text, buttons, inputs
Overflow causing layout breaking or hidden content
Unintended scrollbars or missing scroll behavior
Text or components too small/large on certain breakpoints
Inconsistent font sizes, weights, or line heights
Poor readability due to spacing or contrast
Incorrect or missing theming support (dark/light if applicable)
Dropdowns, modals, tooltips hidden behind elements
Validation messages not visible or unclear

requirements.requirement: Fix all identified issues directly in the source code
Do not only report problems; apply corrections
Do not introduce new libraries unless absolutely necessary
Follow existing CSS / Tailwind / design system conventions
Ensure consistent UI behavior across all pages and components
Preserve existing business logic; only modify UI/UX and styling

validation.step: Re-scan the entire codebase after fixes
Ensure cursor, hover, focus, and interaction states work correctly
Ensure no layout breaking, overlap, or visual glitches remain

output.instruction: Apply fixes directly to the codebase
Provide a summary of all issues found and fixes applied
